# homekit -- General

<!-- AUTO-GENERATED:START -->

## list_homes

List all HomeKit homes configured on this Mac.

### Example

```bash
mcp2cli homekit list_homes
```

## list_motion_sensors

List all motion sensors, occupancy sensors, and doorbells in HomeKit.

### Example

```bash
mcp2cli homekit list_motion_sensors
```

## list_rooms

List all rooms in all HomeKit homes.

### Example

```bash
mcp2cli homekit list_rooms
```

<!-- AUTO-GENERATED:END -->
